description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsBlack wallet with buttoned tab closure and golden enameled buckle detailMetal brand badge on the frontThree fold wallet with flap on left foldTwo main compartmentsFive credit card slots with one slip pocket on the leftFive credit card slots with one slip pocket on the rightEight credit card slots, a photo id card holder with one slip pocket on the flapOne main zippered compartment with two inner separators at backGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 15 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
